# Revise against the editors

Read the current `draft.md`, both latest editor reports, and
`reviews/triage.md`. Return a replacement draft that addresses every required
edit and preserves supported, useful material.

Make material revision deltas visible in a short `## Revision note` at the end:
name the structural, evidentiary, and prose changes from this round. Do not
claim a factual fix without a matching source-to-claim entry in `research.md`.

If any required edit begins `START OVER`, replace the draft from its premise
up. Do not merely polish the rejected structure. If the evidence cannot support
the brief, produce the explicit ungrounded draft rather than cycling fabricated
claims.

End with `<!-- COMPLETE -->`.
